prompt: Generate an ELN for a CRISPR knockout experiment. We knocked out the BRCA1 gene in MCF7 cells (ATCC HTB-22, passage 15) using CRISPR-Cas9. Guide RNA targeting exon 11 (sequence: GCAAGTGTGACGTACAAGCT, Synthego, lot 2024-SG-1). Cas9 protein: Alt-R S.p. Cas9 (IDT 1081058, lot 0000593836). Transfection: Lipofectamine CRISPRMAX (ThermoFisher CMAX00001, lot 2401045). Delivery: RNP complex, 48h post-transfection selection with puromycin 2 µg/mL. Editing efficiency validated by Sanger sequencing (EditR analysis). Objective: generate BRCA1 KO model for DNA damage response studies. Observed 78% indel frequency by Sanger.
